india_trends.title: Semiconductor, railway infra stock jumps following Dalal Street rally
india_trends.summary: MIC Electronics shares rose 6% to ₹40.71, driven by strong market interest and recent order wins from Indian Railways. Despite a 48% decline over six months, the stock has surged 4,740% in five years, showcasing significant investor returns.

india_trends.title: Gold prices fall over 10% since US-Iran war. 5 reasons why safe-haven asset is under pressure
india_trends.summary: Gold prices fell on April 15 due to lower demand, dropping 0.23% to ₹1,54,464 per 10 grams. Internationally, spot gold also declined 0.6%. Analysts attribute the drop to rising interest rates, a stronger US dollar, and profit-taking among investors amid geopolitical tensions.

india_trends.title: Suzlon Energy shares surge 8%, extend 5-day rally as institutional investors raise stake in Q4
india_trends.summary: Suzlon Energy shares surged 7.6% on April 14, marking five consecutive days of gains and a cumulative 19% increase. Institutional investors raised their stake to 4.87%, despite previous pressure.&nbsp;

india_trends.title: Nifty rebounds 8% in April after March rout, but stays below pre-war levels. What does it signal?
india_trends.summary: Nifty has rebounded 8% in April after a sharp March correction but remains below pre-war levels, signalling cautious recovery. The bounce is driven by short covering and selective buying, while persistent FII outflows, elevated crude prices and geopolitical risks continue to weigh on sentiment despi

india_trends.title: Stock market today: Nifty 50 reclaims 24,000. What are the next crucial technical levels for the index?
india_trends.summary: Stock market today: Analysts cautioned on the uncertainty around foreign institutional investor (FII) outflows, and potential earnings downgrades, which could limit valuation expansion.

india_trends.title: Mukul Agrawal buys 25 lakh shares in soaring smallcap bank as other lenders falter
india_trends.summary: Ace investor Mukul Mahavir Agrawal increased his stake in Jammu & Kashmir Bank during the January–March quarter, adding around 25 lakh shares. The lender has seen strong stock gains this year alongside steady operational improvement, supported by rising profitability, improving asset quality and

india_trends.title: 12 stocks held by 100+ MFs surge up to 55% in just over 3 months
india_trends.summary: As of March 2026, data shows that 259 stocks were held by more than 100 mutual fund schemes, highlighting broad-based institutional interest. ETMarkets’ analysis reveals that 50 of these stocks have delivered gains of more than 10% since the start of CY26.

india_trends.title: LIC share price gains 5% after board approves 1:1 bonus issue; up over 15% in April
india_trends.summary: LIC bonus issue: LIC shares surged 5% to ₹841.30 after a 1:1 bonus issue approval, marking three consecutive days of gains. The company proposes to issue 632.49 crore equity shares, increasing its capital to ₹12,649.99 crore.&nbsp;
